svg.text: AOI_HomeAxis — home one shoulder via the ClearLink homing move
Idle -> start on HomeReq rising edge (not already faulted)
State 10 ENABLING: hold the Enable output
State 10: advance once HLFB is asserted (EM806 needs HLFB Inversion, see notes)
State 20 CLEAR MOTOR FAULTS (ensures Ready To Home)
State 20: on Clear-Fault ack, drop the request and advance
State 30 CLEAR ALERTS (clears any latched shutdown)
State 30: when no shutdowns remain, drop the request and advance
State 40: wait for Ready To Home
State 50 BEGIN HOMING MOVE: home flag + velocity move toward the prox
State 55: on Load-Velocity ack, drop the load bit and homing flag
State 60 HOMING: ClearLink zeroes at the prox -> wait Has Homed
Homing timeout (timer runs in states 10..60) -> fault
EM806 alarm or ClearLink shutdown at any time -> fault
State 900 FAULT: clear move bits, hold for coordinator reset
